n: The Dreadful Tales: In Love, Undeath
no: Quests centered around the Temple of Evening Glory, a deity of love, beauty, and undeath. Adds the joinable companion Xzele with optional romance and new areas in Athkatla.

new: Undead NPC companion kit with necromantic abilities.

sum: Quests centered around the Temple of Evening Glory, a deity of love, beauty, and undeath, with a new companion and optional romance.

passive.desc: NPC-only kit. Undead NPC companion kit with necromantic abilities.

co.scn: The Dreadful Tales: In Love, Undeath - a new quest and companion for BG2EE
co.no: New game required. Recommended for fresh EET installs
